title: Natural Killer Bunnies
description: Killer bunnies can spawn naturally, with a configurable spawn chance
body:
# Natural Killer Bunnies
Killer bunnies can now spawn instead of normal rabbits, with a default 2% chance. can be changed by using this command: scoreboard players set #knize.nkb_chance knize.nkb_random <any number between 1 and 1000>

Thats all there is.
